data.title: Bashar Al-Assad And His Family Granted Asylum By Russia: Kremlin Source Says 'Always Spoken In Favor of Political Settlement'
data.description: On Sunday, Dec. 8, 2024, former Syrian President Bashar al-Assad and his family have been granted asylum in Russia, with Moscow citing humanitarian reasons and reiterating support for a political resolution to the Syrian crisis.

data.title: Apple Eyes Sony Partnership For Game-Changing Vision Pro Upgrade
data.description: Apple and Sony are reportedly joining hands to augment the gaming capabilities of the Vision Pro.

data.title: This Analyst Says Bitcoin Could Reach $200K By End of 2025
data.description: Standard Chartered’s Global Head of Digital Assets Research Geoff Kendrick says that Bitcoin‘s (CRYPTO: BTC) value could surge to $200,000 by the end of 2025.

data.title: Musk-Altman Rivalry Intensifies With Trump's Appointment of David Sacks
data.description: The recent appointment of David Sacks as the "White House A.I. and Crypto Czar" by President-elect Donald Trump has sparked a new chapter in the ongoing rivalry between billionaire Elon Musk and Sam Altman, head of OpenAI.

data.title: 22% Of People Think 'Net Worth' Only Applies To The Rich – Here's The Average Net Worth And How To Calculate Yours
